pageContext.name: Lost Space Boy: Draco
pageContext.description: Lost in the stars and amidst stretches of endless blackness, he saw only the vastness of non-existence. Floating among gods that populate the expanse as sparkling spots, forming something so beautiful, he feels good being one with the constellations.  Running along Draco's back, he finds courage from the mighty dragon that guarded the gardens of the Hesperides. Maybe it was the power of the 17 stars that form the fearsome constellation or Ladon's grit pushing him; through the mighty Draco, the Lost Space Boy perseveres in the vastness of non-existence.  At 6 tall and 9 long, Lost Space Boy: Drace by Kerby Rosanes is made from polystone. The Draco constellation is engraved along the translucent body, paying homage to the group of stars that inspired this piece.
